hero.headline: Automate business processes with confidence
hero.subheadline: From a simple workflow to managing AI automation systems across your entire business, Axiom helps you design, deploy, and optimize every step.
hero.platformHeadline: One workspace for automations, agents, and growth systems
hero.platformText: Map your workflows, connect your stack, and let AI agents handle repetitive operations while your team focuses on decisions that matter.

secondSection.headline: Automate business processes with confidence
secondSection.subheadline: From a simple workflow, to managing AI automation systems across your entire business, make it happen with Axiom.

cards.title: Build and ship fast, be first
cards.description: Whatever you want to automate, Axiom gets you moving. Visually design solutions without code to save time.

cards.title: Solve smarter, boost efficiency
cards.description: When complexity grows, Axiom lets you customize automations and plug in AI apps for better, faster results.

cards.title: Orchestrate with clarity and control
cards.description: As you think bigger, create autonomous AI agents and manage everything with a real-time visual map.

services.name: Customer Support AI Agents
services.problem: Support teams lose hours answering repeat questions while urgent customer issues wait in the queue.
services.solution: Deploy AI agents that answer FAQs, resolve common tickets, collect context, and escalate complex cases to your team.
services.roi: Reduce ticket volume by 40-70% and give customers instant support around the clock.
features: Business Problem: Slow replies, repetitive tickets, and rising support costs.
AI Solution: 24/7 support agent trained on your policies, products, and help docs.
Expected ROI: Faster response times, fewer manual tickets, and happier customers.

services.name: Voice Calling AI Agents
services.problem: Missed calls, delayed callbacks, and overloaded teams cause lost revenue and poor customer experience.
services.solution: Use natural voice AI agents to answer calls, qualify needs, capture details, and route calls or tasks instantly.
services.roi: Capture more inbound demand while reducing manual call handling and after-hours leakage.
features: Business Problem: Calls go unanswered or consume too much staff time.
AI Solution: Human-like voice agents for inbound support, reminders, and follow-ups.
Expected ROI: More answered calls, lower staffing pressure, and better conversion.

services.name: Lead Qualification Agents
services.problem: Sales teams waste time chasing low-fit leads while high-intent prospects wait too long.
services.solution: AI agents score, enrich, and qualify leads through chat, forms, email, or CRM workflows.
services.roi: Improve sales focus and increase booked opportunities from your existing lead flow.
features: Business Problem: Too many unqualified leads and inconsistent follow-up.
AI Solution: Automated qualification, scoring, enrichment, and sales routing.
Expected ROI: Higher close rates, cleaner pipeline, and faster speed-to-lead.

services.name: Appointment Booking Agents
services.problem: Manual scheduling creates back-and-forth messages, no-shows, and missed booking opportunities.
services.solution: AI booking agents check availability, answer pre-booking questions, schedule appointments, and send reminders.
services.roi: Increase booked calls while cutting scheduling admin and reducing no-shows.
features: Business Problem: Scheduling friction slows prospects and customers down.
AI Solution: Calendar-connected agents that book, reschedule, and confirm appointments.
Expected ROI: More bookings, fewer no-shows, and less admin work.

services.name: CRM Automation
services.problem: CRM records become messy when updates, follow-ups, and handoffs depend on manual data entry.
services.solution: Automate CRM updates, lead routing, follow-up tasks, lifecycle stages, and reporting across your sales stack.
services.roi: Give teams cleaner data, faster handoffs, and a more reliable revenue pipeline.
features: Business Problem: Incomplete CRM data and manual pipeline management.
AI Solution: Automated updates, reminders, routing, summaries, and CRM workflows.
Expected ROI: Better pipeline visibility, less admin, and stronger sales execution.

services.name: Sales AI Assistants
services.problem: Sales reps spend too much time researching accounts, writing follow-ups, and preparing for calls.
services.solution: AI assistants draft outreach, summarize conversations, prepare call notes, and recommend next best actions.
services.roi: Help reps spend more time selling and less time on repetitive prep and admin.
features: Business Problem: Sales activity is slowed by research, writing, and follow-up work.
AI Solution: Rep copilots for outreach, call prep, summaries, and next-step guidance.
Expected ROI: More productive reps, faster follow-up, and better conversion.

services.name: Internal Knowledge Base Agents
services.problem: Employees lose time searching scattered docs, asking teammates, or repeating the same internal questions.
services.solution: Create secure AI agents that answer questions from your SOPs, docs, policies, and internal knowledge base.
services.roi: Reduce interruptions and help every team member find accurate answers faster.
features: Business Problem: Knowledge is scattered across documents, chats, and teams.
AI Solution: Secure internal assistant trained on approved company knowledge.
Expected ROI: Faster onboarding, fewer repeat questions, and better team alignment.

services.name: Workflow Automation Systems
services.problem: Critical work gets stuck between tools, approvals, spreadsheets, and manual handoffs.
services.solution: Design end-to-end automation systems that connect apps, trigger actions, sync data, and monitor outcomes.
services.roi: Save dozens of hours per month while making operations more consistent and scalable.
features: Business Problem: Manual workflows slow execution and create avoidable errors.
AI Solution: Connected automations across your tools, data, approvals, and alerts.
Expected ROI: Lower operating costs, faster delivery, and fewer process mistakes.

integrationsShowcase.headline: 3,000+ pre-built apps. Limitless integration.
integrationsShowcase.subheadline: Quickly adapt to new market demands by connecting your entire tech stack. Use our library of pre-built apps for instant workflows, and our flexible platform to integrate any custom system.

solutionsSection.headline: Adapt at speed with visual-first automation and AI
solutionsSection.subheadline: Axiom drives efficiencies, solves problems, and speeds innovation by breaking down silos across your business.

tabs.label: People
